column5: より = comparative (A vs B). もっと = intensifier.
column6: Comparing two → より. \"More\" → もっと.
column8: module:02-n4 jlpt:n4 point:より complexity:intro confusable-with:もっと frequency:top1k source:shin-kanzen

column5: もっと = intensifies (more of current). より = compares.
column6: More of what I like → もっと.
column8: module:02-n4 jlpt:n4 point:より complexity:intro confusable-with:より frequency:top1k source:shin-kanzen

column5: のほう = emphatic topicalization. より = baseline.
column6: Emphasizing → のほう. Neutral → より.
column8: module:02-n4 jlpt:n4 point:より complexity:intro confusable-with:より frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen
